Query.SQL: SELECT P.AMOUNT - NVL(P.OVERPAYMENT_AMOUNT, 0) AS "AMOUNT_NOW_DUE" FROM PAYMENTS P WHERE P.TRANSACTION_NUMBER = ${P.TRANSACTION_NUMBER} AND P.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${P.ADMIN_COURT_CODE}

SELECT P.TRANSACTION_NUMBER AS "AO_TRANS_NO" FROM PAYMENTS P WHERE P.RELATED_TRANSACTION_NUMBER = ${P.TRANSACTION_NUMBER} AND P.RELATED_ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${P.ADMIN_COURT_CODE} AND P.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y'
